overall.description: Static nighttime scene from a survival video game depicting a lone campfire burning in a desert landscape, illuminating the surrounding sand dunes and a nearby tent structure under a starry sky.

agents.ego_description: standing still near the campfire, observing the flames and the surrounding desert night

entered.detail: burning campfire with flickering flames providing warm orange light
rising smoke drifting upward from the campfire into the night sky
dark canvas tent or shelter partially visible on the right side
rolling sand dunes extending into the darkness on the left
rolling sand dunes extending into the darkness on the right

segments.scene_description: A completely static nighttime scene in a desert environment centered on a burning campfire. The fire illuminates the immediate sandy area with warm flickering light while smoke rises steadily upward. A tent structure stands to the right, and sand dunes stretch into the dark distance under a clear starry sky. No camera movement or character action occurs beyond the ambient fire animation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a lonely desert encampment under a vast nocturnal sky. It begins centered on a burning campfire that casts a warm, flickering glow across the immediate sandy terrain. As the fire crackles, smoke rises steadily into the air, contrasting with the deep shadows of the surrounding environment. The scene remains fixed, highlighting the stillness of a nearby tent structure and the undulating sand dunes that stretch toward a distant, star-filled horizon.
